title: Fingardia latilabris
taxonomy: Fingardia latilabris is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Fingardia. Fingardia latilabris is native to South Africa. The classification of Fingardia latilabris is part of the larger taxonomy of the Asteraceae family. Fingardia latilabris is a type of daisy that is commonly found in the wild.
